Downtown Devour

You're a hungry hole competing against 3 rival holes. Eat everything. Grow bigger. Devour your rivals. Last hole standing wins.
Choose Game Mode
⏱️ Timed Two-minute round. Score wins. Classic Downtown Devour.
⚔️ Last Man Standing No timer. No scoring pressure. Survive until only one hole remains.
🌊 Waves Four progressively brutal waves. Smaller boards, deadlier soldiers. Score accumulates.
Desktop: move your mouse OR use W/A/S/D (or arrow keys) to steer.
Mobile: drag in the direction you want to go (joystick-style).
Avoid bigger holes — they'll eat you. Hunt smaller ones.
Music: procedurally generated orchestral theme in D minor, 128 BPM

Time's Up!

You can cash in your score now — or stay in the arena until only one hole remains.
